rgbaPngSequence.status: selected and confirmed by successful 300-frame mixed render

decision: Use 8-bit RGBA PNG sequence as the Milestone 0 transparent bridge default for Remotion finishing. It completed the 300-frame mixed finish in the 17.0-17.4 second measured range. Retain 8-bit qtrle/ARGB MOV as a compact FFmpeg-valid fallback only for consumers that prove decoder compatibility; it is not compatible with the pinned Remotion OffthreadVideo path.
